'''Andra''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] native from [[Telos IV]].

==Biography==
She was the founder and sole member of the [[Preserve Our Wild Endangered Resources Party]], and with the aide of the criminal [[Denetrus]], she helped [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] foil [[Xanatos]]' plot to bring [[Offworld Mining Corporation]] onto Telos. She later married Denetrus and, with the [[Chun family]], helped develop the ''[[BioCruiser]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
